title: Historical Packet 028 And Packet 029 Authority Publication And Host Mirror Resync Gate

active_role: Olares Post-029 Authority Publication And Resync Operator

required_inputs: Current workstation parent-root git status at `C:/APEX Platform`
Current `/home/olares/code/apex` branch, commit, cleanliness, and Packet 028 or Packet 029 authority presence evidence

validation_steps: Verify Packet 029 completed and did not approve migration or execute source edits.
Verify `/home/olares/code/apex` is clean at the Packet 028 governing commit before publication.

Exclude `.vercelignore`, runtime artifacts, generated artifacts, secrets, package files, lockfiles, source edits, and unrelated workspace changes.
Publish the bounded parent-root commit to `clean-main` and record the commit hash.
Fast-forward-only synchronize `/home/olares/code/apex` to the published commit.
Verify the host mirror is clean and contains Packet 028 and Packet 029 closure authority.
Stop if additional host drift exists or if resync would require force, reset, clean, remote rewrite, runtime mutation, service mutation, install work, source edits, or old-clone mutation.
sql_permission_note: This packet authorizes only bounded authority publication and host-mirror resync. It does not authorize database writes, runtime mutation, service changes, install work, package changes, source edits, AI-services rollout, Gitea work, canonical-hosting changes, migration approval, remote rewrite, force/reset/clean, or old-clone mutation.
